message_text: I do want to clear this loan, but I cannot pay the full amount today.
I am an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira Finance. This conversation is being logged. For verification, confirm the last 2 digits of the phone number on file.
Verified. Loan ****4831, amount due 12921. Do you expect any income or a new job within 30 days?
Yes, I should have some income by then—my salary is delayed right now, but I can make a small payment today and the rest after my next payday.
Understood. I will note temporary hardship with expected income within 30 days. You will be contacted by phone to discuss the available next steps for this account.

That works. I can make a small payment now and then pay the बाकी after my next salary date—please share the amount and date you can set up.

I can set up one approved option:

- Reduced closure: 88% of 12,921 = 11,384.48
- Due within 7 days
- One payment only

If you want a structured plan instead, it allows up to 2 payments: first within 3 days, final within 30 days.

Reply with one of these:
1) reduced closure for 11,384.48 within 7 days, or
2) 2-payment plan with your first payment amount and date within 3 days.
I can do the 2-payment plan. I can pay ₹2,000 within 3 days, and the rest after my next salary date within 30 days.

Approved plan: ₹2,000 within 3 days, then the remaining ₹10,921 within 30 days of this offer. Reply with the date for the first payment and the date for the final payment, or confirm you want this set up as stated.
Yes, please set it up as stated. My first payment can be on 21 April 2026, and the final payment on 15 May 2026.
Approved plan: ₹2,000 due by 21 April 2026, then ₹10,921 due by 15 May 2026. Reply with confirm to lock this in, or state a different first-payment amount within the same 3-day window.
Confirmed — please lock in the plan.
Confirmed. Approved plan is locked as stated: ₹2,000 due by 21 April 2026, then ₹10,921 due by 15 May 2026. This conversation is logged. Reply if you need the payment reference details.
